sections.a_description: Diseases that strike before a single line of code is written. The idea phase is where most projects silently die — stuck in loops of overthinking, chasing, and skipping.

a_image.alt: Scattered lightbulbs on a dark surface, some shattered some glowing faintly, idea overload concept

sections.a_description: The diseases that strike before a single line of code is written.

items.a_description: Trapped in an endless loop of research, comparison, and what-ifs. You know everything about the market — except how to start.

a_image.alt: Vintage compass with the needle spinning wildly in multiple directions at once, motion blur on the needle, dark wooden surface, dramatic overhead lighting, macro photography

items.a_description: Every week there's a better idea. The current project is 60% done but the new one feels 100% exciting.

a_image.alt: Magpie bird surrounded by scattered glittering jewels, coins, and metallic trinkets on a dark surface, some objects half-buried, dark moody atmosphere, dramatic spotlight from above

items.a_description: Building first, asking questions never. The product is finished — but nobody was ever asked if they wanted it.

a_image.alt: Person mid-leap over a wide gap in a crumbling stone bridge, far side barely visible in fog, dramatic perspective from below, dark stormy sky, cinematic lighting
